sentence.sentence_en: She speaks fluent English, but has a charming French accent.

sentence.sentence_en: Please turn off your mobile phone before the movie begins.

sentence.sentence_en: You need a good sense of balance to ride a bicycle.

sentence.sentence_en: Several modern European states rely heavily on safe nuclear energy.
sentence.sentence_pl: Kilka nowoczesnych państw europejskich opiera się mocno na bezpiecznej energii jądrowej.

sentence.sentence_en: Please do not shout inside the quiet university study library.

sentence.sentence_en: Her excellent job interview performance left a wonderful professional impression.
